commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 14:13 And Asa and the people that were with him pursued them unto Gerar: and the Ethiopians were overthrown, so that they could not recover themselves; for they were destroyed before the LORD, and before his army; and they carried away very much plunder. Gerara was on the southern borders, twenty-three miles from Maresa. (Eusebius) (Calmet) The Ethiopians were pursued perhaps for many days. (Tirinus) Destruction. Protestants, "that they could not recover themselves. "Hebrew, "there was no quarter given "or, "so that none were left alive. "(Calmet) If this were the case, the number of the slain far exceeded that the Jeroboam's army, chap.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
